title: The Enigma of Betsy Aardsma

scenes.text: A college student's murder remains unsolved, haunting the community.
Betsy Aardsma was killed on a campus at the University Park, Pennsylvania.
She was murdered in 1969, and the case remains cold with little evidence.
The ongoing mystery continues to captivate true crime enthusiasts.
New theories emerge every year, but the case remains unsolved.
scenes.label: THEORIES ABOUND

description: 📍 University Park, USA - 1969. Betsy Aardsma was murdered, and her case remains one of the longest cold cases in Pennsylvania. The university community still seeks answers. Follow for daily mysteries!
